title: Letter Combinations of a Phone Number
problem_statement: Given a string containing digits 2-9 inclusive, return all possible letter combinations that the number could represent using telephone keypad letters.
intuition: Use backtracking to append one letter per digit and explore all combinations.

approaches.name: Recursive Combination Build
approaches.description: Map each digit to its letters, then backtrack across digits building each string character by character.

interview_qa.q: What is the branching factor for each digit?
interview_qa.a: Each digit maps to 3 or 4 letters, so the total combinations grow exponentially with the number of digits.

interview_qa.q: Why use StringBuilder instead of string concatenation?
interview_qa.a: StringBuilder avoids creating a new string at every step and is more efficient for repeated append/remove operations.
